news.title:
Eris Lifesciences and Natco Pharma launch generic Ozempic at 90% lower price, targeting diabetes care.
Eris prices vials at Rs.1,290; Natco offers co-marketing options to expand GLP-1 therapy adoption.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences and Natco Pharma launch generic Ozempic at 90% lower price, targeting diabetes care.
Eris prices vials at Rs.1,290; Natco offers co-marketing options to expand GLP-1 therapy adoption.

news.title: Eris Lifesciences expands metabolic care portfolio with Semaglutide, targeting weight and blood sugar management.
news.summary: Eris Lifesciences expands metabolic care portfolio with Semaglutide, targeting weight and blood sugar management.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences launches SUNDAE, generic Semaglutide, in India from 21 March 2026.
Priced at Rs 1,290/month for vials, Rs 4,000-4,500/month for pens, targeting diabetes care.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences launches SUNDAE, generic Semaglutide, in India from 21 March 2026.
Priced at Rs 1,290/month for vials, Rs 4,000-4,500/month for pens, targeting diabetes care.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences acquires branded probiotics from Velbiom Probiotics for ₹50 cr.
Velbiom's revenue over the last three years was ₹16.02 cr, ₹19.64 cr, ₹17.56 cr.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences acquires branded probiotics from Velbiom Probiotics for ₹50 cr.
Velbiom's revenue over the last three years was ₹16.02 cr, ₹19.64 cr, ₹17.56 cr.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences partners with Natco Pharma to launch Semaglutide in India.
Semaglutide is used for managing type 2 diabetes and weight loss.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences partners with Natco Pharma to launch Semaglutide in India.
Semaglutide is used for managing type 2 diabetes and weight loss.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences targets revenue of ₹550-600 crore for FY27.
The company forecasts EBITDA between ₹180-200 crore for FY27.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences targets revenue of ₹550-600 crore for FY27.
The company forecasts EBITDA between ₹180-200 crore for FY27.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences ranks among top 20 Indian pharma firms, with 80% revenue from super specialty.
It focuses on acquisitions, debt reduction to 1.5x EBITDA by Dec 2026, and international expansion.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences ranks among top 20 Indian pharma firms, with 80% revenue from super specialty.
It focuses on acquisitions, debt reduction to 1.5x EBITDA by Dec 2026, and international expansion.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences moves from expensive to fair valuation amid market challenges.
The shift reflects changing investor sentiment and reassessment vs peers in the pharma sector.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences moves from expensive to fair valuation amid market challenges.
The shift reflects changing investor sentiment and reassessment vs peers in the pharma sector.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences' Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹2.81B from ₹2.5B YoY.
EBITDA margin improves slightly to 34.9% from 34.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences' Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹2.81B from ₹2.5B YoY.
EBITDA margin improves slightly to 34.9% from 34.4% YoY.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences schedules board meeting on Feb 13, 2026 to approve Q3 & 9-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1, 2026 until 48 hours post result declaration per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences schedules board meeting on Feb 13, 2026 to approve Q3 & 9-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1, 2026 until 48 hours post result declaration per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.
news.summary:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences issued 23.06L shares at ₹1835.35 each to acquire 16.74L Swiss Parenterals shares.
Swiss Parenterals becomes a wholly-owned subsidiary, increasing paid-up capital to ₹13.85 cr from ₹13.62 cr.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences issued 23.06L shares at ₹1835.35 each to acquire 16.74L Swiss Parenterals shares.
Swiss Parenterals becomes a wholly-owned subsidiary, increasing paid-up capital to ₹13.85 cr from ₹13.62 cr.

news.title:
Semaglutide patent expiry could create ₹5,000 crore opportunity for Indian pharma firms.
Firms may benefit in regulated markets like Canada and Brazil, per Systematix Group report.
news.summary:
Semaglutide patent expiry could create ₹5,000 crore opportunity for Indian pharma firms.
Firms may benefit in regulated markets like Canada and Brazil, per Systematix Group report.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences outlined focus on revenue, margins, acquisitions, and expansion into diabetes, injectables, and global markets.
The company detailed capex, debt reduction plans, and expects improved profitability and debt ratios.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences outlined focus on revenue, margins, acquisitions, and expansion into diabetes, injectables, and global markets.
The company detailed capex, debt reduction plans, and expects improved profitability and debt ratios.

news.title:
Indian pharma exports remain resilient against potential US tariffs on branded drugs.
Eris Lifesciences acquires 30% stake in Swiss Parenterals for Rs 4.23 billion.
news.summary:
Indian pharma exports remain resilient against potential US tariffs on branded drugs.
Eris Lifesciences acquires 30% stake in Swiss Parenterals for Rs 4.23 billion.

news.title:
Cello World enters agreement to assign Cello Brand trademark for stationery and writing instruments, zero royalty.
Dr. Reddy’s, Paras Defence among 10 stocks in focus on Nov 25.
news.summary:
Cello World enters agreement to assign Cello Brand trademark for stationery and writing instruments, zero royalty.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences approves acquisition of 30% stake in Swiss Parenterals for INR 423.3 cr via preferential shares.
Swiss Parenterals' turnover grew from INR 220.8 cr to INR 351.1 cr over 3 years.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences approves acquisition of 30% stake in Swiss Parenterals for INR 423.3 cr via preferential shares.
Swiss Parenterals' turnover grew from INR 220.8 cr to INR 351.1 cr over 3 years.

news.title:
Eris Lifesciences plans a board meeting on Nov 24, 2025 to discuss equity issuance via preferential issue.
The issuance aims to acquire the remaining 30% stake in Swiss Parenterals Ltd, subject to approvals.
news.summary:
Eris Lifesciences plans a board meeting on Nov 24, 2025 to discuss equity issuance via preferential issue.
The issuance aims to acquire the remaining 30% stake in Swiss Parenterals Ltd, subject to approvals.

news.summary: Eris Lifesciences Ltd conducted its earnings call discussing financial performance.
